# 📝 CEO 종합 보고서

## 🗂 작업 라운드 — 누가 뭐 했나

### 📺 레오 _(Head of YouTube)_
> 📋 **지시**: Conduct marketing campaign on Youtube
> 🔧 **도구 실행**: `my_videos_check.py (prefetch)`
> 📊 **수집 데이터**: YouTube 채널 영상 분석 (실제 API 데이터) _(exit 1)_
> 💡 **핵심 산출**: 사장님의 지시("YouTube 마케팅 캠페인 수행")를 받았습니다. 이는 광범위한 목표이므로, 가장 가치 있는 단일 작업으로 압축하여 즉시 실행 가능한 결과물을 도출하겠습니다. / 📊 평가: 진행중 — 초기 데이터 수집 단계이며, 다음 단계에서 구체적인 기획서 생성을 통해 목표에 도달할 수 있습니다.
> 📝 산출물 길이: 2531자

### 📷 Instagram _(Head of Instagram)_
> 📋 **지시**: Develop Instagram release with clear call to action.
> 🔧 **도구 실행**: _(없음 — LLM 추론만)_
> 💡 **핵심 산출**: Instagram release with clear call to action (CTA). The goal is for each agent in the company to decide on a single, valuable task that aligns best with their personal goals (_agents/{id}/goal.md) and 
> 📝 산출물 길이: 312자

### 🎨 Designer _(Lead Designer)_
> 📋 **지시**: Create unique brand visuals
> 🔧 **도구 실행**: _(없음 — LLM 추론만)_
> 💡 **핵심 산출**: Here is what we need:
> 📝 산출물 길이: 1726자

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

## 👔 CEO 종합

📚 Brand Release CTA (CTA) and Goal Setting for Each Agent in the Company _agents/{id}/goals are required to align best with their personal goals, review recent decision-making moments within 24 hours (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_agents).
![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)
Goal Setting for Each Agent in the Company _agents/{id}/goals are required to align best with their personal goals, review recent decision-making moments within 24 hours (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_agents). Your task is: Develop unique brand visuals that convey our company's personality and target audience.
![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)
1. Brand Story & Tone:  - Who is AICoreLab? What do we stand for in our brand story (e.g., "AI Connect", the name of your company). Target Audience Profile can be provided if needed to capture demographics, interests and needs associated with them within this context (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_audiences)
2. Visual Concepts:  - Choose two concepts (e.g., abstract or conceptual), but keep it relatable in the brand's aim of conveying our company’s identity to its target audience and thus align with their needs (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_visuals)
3. Style Guide :   Select colors that are visually pleasing, reflecting your core image (e.g., pastels or hues). Choose suitable fonts for brand readiness on the page – it should be clean and minimalist (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_stylesheets)
4. Resources: Provide any relevant information to use as a base, such references that can aid in developing your visuals (e.g., design templates or resources available online). If you don't have specific materials at hand yet for this purpose (_company_agents/youtube/tools/_resources)
Let’s achieve it!  Let the creativity flow into action._
